news.t: First Trust Expands Target Outcome® Lineup with Launch of DGOC, A 10% Buffer ETF that Seeks to Provide Positive Return Potential in Up, Flat, and Modestly Down Markets

overview.description: The FT Vest U.S. Equity Buffer & Digital Return ETF - October (DGOC) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in downside hedge alternatives. The fund aims for specific buffered losses and capped gains on the SPDR S&P 500 ETF Trust over a specific holdings period. The actively managed fund holds options and collateral. DGOC was launched on Oct 17, 2025 and is issued by First Trust.

data.text: WHEATON, Ill.--(BUSINESS WIRE)--First Trust Advisors L.P. (“First Trust”) a leading exchange-traded fund (“ETF”) provider and asset manager, announced today that it has launched the FT Vest U.S. Buffe...
